title: News Briefing: Nasdaq Index and Shopify Updates
description: Recent reports regarding Shopify are influencing interest in the Nasdaq index, according to financial news sources.

sources.title: Shopify stock price target maintained at $170 by RBC Capital
Shopify's Quiet AI Strategy Could Be Its Biggest Advantage Yet
Shopify’s $120 Billion Revival Is Catching Shorts Off Guard

sections.heading: Analyst Price Targets
paragraphs: According to Investing.com, RBC Capital has maintained a stock price target of $170 for Shopify.

sections.heading: Market Valuation
paragraphs: 24/7 Wall St. reports that Shopify is experiencing a revival valued at $120 billion, which is catching short sellers off guard.

sections.heading: Strategic Analysis
paragraphs: TradingView suggests that Shopify's quiet strategy regarding artificial intelligence could potentially be its biggest advantage yet.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates a search volume lower bound of 500 for the term "nasdaq index" in the IN region. Google Trends analyzes the popularity of top search queries across various regions and languages.
